cross_scene_arcs.title: The Burden of the Bargain with Mr. Nick
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Doctor Parnassus confronts the consequences of a supernatural debt to Mr. Nick, evolving from fear and despair to a desperate contest for Valentina's soul, culminating in sacrifice and unresolved spiritual tension.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: emotionally distressed and overwhelmed by Nick's arrival
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: reinforces uncertainty of outcomes while Nick remains a silent observer
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Mr. Nick's presence suggests the spiritual contest may never truly end

cross_scene_arcs.title: Father-Daughter Reconciliation and Estrangement
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Parnassus's relationship with Valentina shifts from strained authority to rupture over truth and trust, then to sacrificial protection and a fragile, distant reunion.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: acknowledged as father but emotionally distant in her new life
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how to rebuild relationship after years of absence and broken trust

cross_scene_arcs.title: Guardianship of the Imaginarium and Storytelling Mission
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Parnassus strives to maintain control and purpose of the Imaginarium, from defending its sanctity to pursuing soul redemptions, ending with a humble continuation of storytelling without guarantees.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: regains control of the troupe and protects the mirror world
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: sells toy theatres, accepting uncertainty in stories and outcomes
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether the mission of redemption and storytelling can truly prevail

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Despair and Moral Isolation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Parnassus experiences emotional collapse, public humiliation, and rejection by Valentina, leading to a sacrificial act that isolates him morally and physically.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: public failure and emotional collapse on the cliff
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: presumed dead after trampling, sacrificing himself for Valentina
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: his survival and moral standing remain ambiguous

cross_scene_arcs.title: Recovery of Identity and Belonging
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tony transitions from amnesia to self-awareness by reclaiming his name, a meaningful possession, and emotional bonds, gradually integrating into the troupe as a valued member.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: named, emotionally connected, emerging as a leader
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Tony has no memory of how he ended up under the bridge.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Rise and Fall of Authority
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tony gains influence by proposing changes and forming emotional alliances, but his authority erodes as his criminal past is exposed, leading to violent outbursts and loss of trust.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: his past remains a source of tension and danger

cross_scene_arcs.title: Relationship with Valentina and the Troupe
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tony's bond with Valentina evolves from gratitude to intimacy and protection, but deteriorates into conflict after his abuse is revealed, marking a shift from ally to antagonist.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Valentina views Tony as a good person
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Valentina is physically assaulted and fully alienated
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether reconciliation or further conflict will follow

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confrontation with the Past and Moral Accountability
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tony faces escalating exposure of his past actions, from admitting ignorance about a crime syndicate to violent denial of abuse, culminating in public collapse of his moral standing.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: defends moral character despite incomplete disclosure
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether Tony is innocent or complicit in the crime syndicate's activities

cross_scene_arcs.title: Final Struggle for Survival and Truth
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tony uncovers Mr. Nick's deception and prevents Parnassus from being manipulated into killing him, but is ultimately betrayed and executed by the mob after a false rescue.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: believes he can survive by revealing the truth
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: dead, having been hanged by the mob
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How Tony's death impacts the ongoing conflict between Parnassus and Nick

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escape and Self-Defense Against Martin
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Valentina is physically threatened by Martin and responds with increasing assertiveness, first fleeing into the mirror and later punching him to break free.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: physically threatened and cornered by Martin
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: creates distance from Martin through physical resistance
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Martin remains hostile and continues to pursue her

cross_scene_arcs.title: Defiance of Paternal Authority and Magical Legacy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Valentina repeatedly challenges Dr. Parnassus’s control, from defending her actions to rejecting his moral authority and ultimately affirming her independent life choices.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: constrained by her father's rules and grief-laden expectations
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: self-actualized and emotionally independent from her father
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Dr. Parnassus's silence leaves emotional closure incomplete

cross_scene_arcs.title: Assertion of Autonomy and Normalcy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Valentina moves from concealing her age to rejecting a fated magical inheritance and embracing an ordinary life as a mother and partner.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: presented as younger than she is, living within a magical performance world
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: openly claims her age and affirms her happiness in a domestic, ordinary life
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: tension between her magical upbringing and desire for normalcy remains emotionally present

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral Agency in Crisis Situations
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Valentina consistently acts to protect others in distress—first demanding rescue of a hanged man, then insisting he be sheltered, and later advocating for his care.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: reacts with horror to a man in peril
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: assumes full responsibility for the man's safety and well-being
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: the man's true identity and the consequences of harboring him remain unclear

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confrontation with Coercion and Fate
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Valentina is pulled into the mirror by Tony under duress and then actively resists Mr. Nick's control by choosing her own path through the 'His' mirror.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: confused and overwhelmed, taken into the mirror against her will
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: exercises agency by outmaneuvering Mr. Nick and entering the 'His' mirror on her own terms
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: the consequences of entering the 'His' mirror and Tony's true nature remain uncertain
